summary: Comprehensive Frontend Audit for ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE - All tested routes working in preview environment. The 'dimensional rift' error reported by user on production (enlighten-mint-cafe.me) could NOT be reproduced in the preview environment. All 45+ routes tested load without triggering the CosmicErrorBoundary. The /apex-creator route returns 404 as expected because it is NOT registered in App.js - only /creator-console is mapped to ApexCreatorPage.

route_issues.issue: Route NOT registered in App.js - returns 404 (NotFound page). Only /creator-console is mapped to ApexCreatorPage.
route_issues.fix: Add route: <Route path="/apex-creator" element={<ApexCreatorPage />} /> to App.js if this route is needed

bottom_dock_audit.location: Mounted globally via SovereignProviders, outside CosmicErrorBoundary
bottom_dock_audit.note: Bottom dock appears on ALL pages including 404 because MixerProvider wraps the entire app outside the error boundary

dimensional_rift_analysis.reproduction_status: COULD NOT REPRODUCE in preview environment
possible_causes: User-specific data causing a component to throw (e.g., malformed user profile, corrupted localStorage)
Network/API failure causing a component to crash during render
Production-specific build issue not present in preview
Browser extension or ad blocker interfering with app
Stale service worker cache serving old/incompatible code
recommended_debugging_steps: 1. Ask user to clear localStorage and try again
2. Ask user to clear service worker cache (Application > Service Workers > Unregister)
3. Ask user to try in incognito mode to rule out extensions
4. Add more detailed error logging to CosmicErrorBoundary.componentDidCatch to capture full stack trace
5. Check if production build has any differences from preview

action_items: CRITICAL: Add /apex-creator route to App.js if this URL is being used/linked anywhere
RECOMMENDED: Enhance CosmicErrorBoundary to log full error stack traces to console and optionally to backend for debugging
RECOMMENDED: Add error boundary around individual context providers in SovereignProviders to isolate which provider might be causing issues
INVESTIGATE: Check production deployment for any differences from preview environment
critical_code_review_comments: The /apex-creator route is NOT registered in App.js - only /creator-console maps to ApexCreatorPage (line 581)
MixerProvider (UnifiedCreatorConsole) is mounted outside CosmicErrorBoundary, which is why the bottom dock appears even on error pages
CosmicErrorBoundary only logs error to console - consider adding more detailed logging or error reporting
The app has 27+ context providers nested in SovereignProviders - any of these could throw during initialization and cause the error boundary to trigger
context_for_next_testing_agent: All routes tested in preview environment work correctly. The 'dimensional rift' error could not be reproduced. The /apex-creator route is NOT registered in App.js (only /creator-console is). If user continues to see the error on production, investigate: (1) user-specific data issues, (2) service worker cache, (3) production build differences. Consider adding more detailed error logging to CosmicErrorBoundary.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: User reports 'dimensional rift' (CosmicErrorBoundary fallback) on production site
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction_status: COULD NOT REPRODUCE in preview environment
root_cause_hypothesis: 1. User-specific data corruption (localStorage, user profile, etc.)
2. Stale service worker cache serving incompatible code
4. Network failure during critical API calls
mitigation_steps: 1. Clear localStorage and service worker cache
3. Add detailed error logging to CosmicErrorBoundary
